description: EnvZ-OmpR from Abasy Atlas: meta-curated two-component system and OmpR regulon (ompF, ompC, micF) with regulatory edges.
name: EnvZ-OmpR (Abasy-sourced)
notes: V6 = Abasy only. OmpR regulon: ompF, ompC, micF; EnvZ-OmpR phosphotransfer; micF represses ompF.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ENVZ[EnvZ]
    OMPR[OmpR regulon]
    OMPF[ompF]
    OMPC[ompC]
    MICF[micF]
    ENVZ -->|phosphotransfer| OMPR
    OMPR -->|activation| OMPF
    OMPR -->|activation| OMPC
    OMPR -->|repression| MICF
    MICF -->|represses| OMPF
    style ENVZ fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPR fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style OMPF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style OMPC fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style MICF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: From Abasy Atlas v2.2 E. coli regulatory network; OmpR targets and micF.
